name: José Miguel Fernández
headline: Backend Software Engineer | Java, Spring Boot, Distributed Systems, Microservices
tagline: Backend engineer focused on resilient services, clean architecture and product-minded execution.
focus: Distributed systems, microservices, cloud delivery and backend reliability
availability: Open to product-focused engineering conversations and backend-heavy roles.
summary: I build backend systems that need to stay reliable under change, remain clear to evolve, and support teams that ship continuously without losing control of quality.

My main stack is Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Docker and Kubernetes, with hands-on work across microservices, observability, CI/CD, database automation and internal tooling. I also bring fullstack judgment when a product needs backend ownership with pragmatic frontend support.
signals: Fullstack support when product execution needs it

focusAreas.title: Backend Architecture
focusAreas.description: Service design, API boundaries, security and maintainable domain logic.

focusAreas.title: Distributed Systems
focusAreas.description: Systems that communicate reliably, scale predictably and are observable in production.

focusAreas.title: Cloud Delivery
focusAreas.description: Build, deploy and operate with an emphasis on repeatability and operational confidence.

focusAreas.title: Product Engineering
focusAreas.description: I can move from backend depth to internal tools and polished user-facing flows when needed.

experience.description: Working in an international product environment on the modernization of an enterprise backend platform, contributing to architecture evolution, service reliability and developer workflow quality.
highlights: Built and evolved Spring Boot microservices with Spring Security and PostgreSQL in a security-sensitive product environment.
Contributed to the migration path from a legacy Scala monolith to a more modular microservices architecture with better maintainability and delivery speed.
Automated database lifecycle changes with Liquibase to keep multiple environments aligned and reduce release friction.
Improved confidence in backend changes through JUnit coverage and contract testing with Pact.
Supported internal product operations through React and TypeScript back-office work when backend ownership required end-to-end execution.
Translated complex flows into shared diagrams and implementation discussions to align engineers and stakeholders.

experience.description: Grew from trainee to senior contributor while shipping features, infrastructure improvements and platform evolutions for large educational products operating across multiple international markets.
highlights: Drove a Docker-based development workflow that standardized environments and improved team productivity across projects.
Helped lead the evolution to a multi-language, multi-portal platform supporting broader international growth.
Integrated payment flows and advanced search capabilities, balancing product goals with technical maintainability.
Worked across backend and frontend layers with PHP, JavaScript, HTML and CSS on high-traffic business-critical platforms.
Improved performance, security and Core Web Vitals through iterative optimization work.
Raised engineering quality through code review practices, collaboration habits and continuous improvement.

education.degree: Master's Degree in Web and Mobile Technologies Programming
education.description: Graduate program focused on web and mobile development, application architecture and digital product delivery.

education.degree: Higher Technician in Cross-Platform Application Development
education.description: Advanced technical training in software development across platforms, covering Java, databases, testing, version control and application architecture.

certifications.name: Master Microservices with Spring Boot, Docker and Kubernetes

company.title: Microservices Modernization Platform
company.context: International backend team modernizing a cloud platform for a product organization operating at enterprise scale.
company.summary: Backend modernization work centered on Spring Boot services, secure APIs, database delivery workflows and operational confidence during the transition away from a legacy monolith.
highlights: Contributed to a long-term migration from a Scala monolith to a more maintainable service architecture.
Developed secure backend services with Spring Boot and Spring Security.
Automated database change delivery with Liquibase across multiple environments.
Improved release confidence with automated tests and contract testing.

company.title: Euroinnova International Education Platform
company.context: Core digital product used to capture, convert and serve educational demand across multiple markets.
company.summary: Large-scale platform work across backend, frontend and infrastructure, focused on performance, business delivery and maintainable feature evolution.
highlights: Worked on lead generation, search, payment and UX-critical flows.
Helped evolve the platform toward a multi-language, multi-portal product structure.
Improved performance and Core Web Vitals through iterative optimization.
Collaborated with product, marketing and design stakeholders on business-facing delivery.

company.title: EduCash Affiliate Platform
company.context: Affiliate management product supporting operational reporting, partner workflows and payment-related processes.
company.summary: End-to-end delivery of a web platform used to manage affiliate relationships, reporting flows and internal operations tied to growth channels.
highlights: Built the platform from implementation to ongoing improvement.
Delivered dashboards, reporting tools and partner management workflows.
Integrated the product with existing company systems and business processes.
Balanced operational usability with product and marketing requirements.

personal.title: CV Studio
personal.context: A professional CV builder designed for technical profiles with live editing, strong data modeling and polished PDF output.
personal.summary: A product-oriented side project combining frontend UX, validation, document generation and structured resume data. Built to solve a real problem with a high-quality developer-facing experience.

imgHover.alt: CV Studio live preview and PDF export

highlights: Built a real-time editor with synchronized preview over structured JSON data.
Implemented ATS-friendly PDF export optimized for A4 output.
Designed reusable templates and a scalable typed architecture.
Combined product polish with strong validation and document-generation logic.
